Event: Royal Challenge - Season 14
Event Date: 01/06/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: RI96
Branch of Weakness Ring

Once in a while, drains the life force from the enemy with the greatest damage for 5 sec. While low on life force, the unit deals 50% less damage and takes 20% more damage. Up to 5 effects.

Requirements: 98-100
